fullDescription:
Track your in-office attendance effortlessly. Mark days as in-office, absent, public holiday, personal leave, or sick leave.

Features:
• Calendar view with color-coded statuses
• Monthly insights with Incl./Excl. percentage tracking
• Dashboard with progress ring and daily stats
• Export attendance data to Excel
• Import from Excel spreadsheet
• Download sample Excel template
• Customizable target percentage

All data stored locally on your device. No account or internet required.
